CustomField.formula: IF(Escalated__c, "Escalated", IF(Planned_Date__c > TODAY(),"Future", IF(Planned_Date__c <= TODAY() && TEXT(Status__c) != "Complete", "InProgress", IF(Planned_Date__c <= TODAY() && TEXT(Status__c) == "Complete", "Complete", IF(ISNULL(Planned_Date__c) , "NotPlanned", "")))))
CustomField.label: Final Status
